rows.label: qev025303_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza! Are
you here to buy a Pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025303_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm still not quite used to baking them, so...
All I can sell right now are Frozen Pizzas.
Is that okay? It'll be 1000G, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025303_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't want frozen food.

rows.label: qev025303_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thanks! It's frozen, but I made it
exactly how Powell taught me. I
guarantee the taste, so here, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Yeah, you're right... I really need
to polish my skills and learn how
to bake lots of Pizzas soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025303_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Wait, are you short on money?
Sorry, but our motto is cash only.[ST:wait ]
